text: Hey <@U5STGTB3J>! Thanks so much for listening to the podcast! It mean so much to me that you're finding value in it

That's a great question... a lot of thoughts around that project are scattered all over my journal (<http://futureofcoding.org/joural|futureofcoding.org/joural>) but I'm reorganizing website imminently (<https://github.com/stevekrouse/futureofcoding.org/issues/51#issuecomment-334211450>) which should help. In the meanwhile, let me create a github issue for this to start answering your question... <https://github.com/stevekrouse/futureofcoding.org/issues/54>

attachments.title: StreamSheets - streams as spreadsheets · Issue #54 · stevekrouse/futureofcoding.org
attachments.text: StreamSheets In many scattered places in my /journal, I mention the StreamSheets project. I also mention it in /ideas. However until I reorganize this website around ideas (as opposed to time), thi...
